title: Module 1
content:
Bio potential and bio electrodes: Cell structure – electrode – electrode
potential- resting and action potential –Refractory period- Electrode
electrolyte interface, Half-cell potential, Polarisable and Non-polarisable
electrodes - Skin electrode interface – Bioelectrodes: Types of electrodes-
Micro electrodes, Depth and Needle electrodes, Surface electrodes-
Equivalent circuits of electrodes

title: Module 2
content:
Biopotential Recorders: Characteristics of the recording system,
Electrocardiogram - Einthoven triangle, Standard 12-lead configurations -
ECG Machine-Electroencephalograp hy(EEG) –Brain waves, waveforms &
measurements, Evoked potentials,Sleep stages , 10-20 electrodes placement
system for EEG – EEG machine

title: Module 3
content:
Measurement of Physiological Parameters: Blood Pressure measurement-
Blood Flow Meters: Need for blood flow meters, Electromagnetic blood
flowmeters- Applications of electromagnetic blood flowmeters, Ultrasonic
blood flowmeter: Ultrasonic blood flowmeter based on transit time principle,
Doppler blood flowmeters-laser based Doppler blood flowmeters-Cardiac
output measurements.

title: Module 4
content:
Physiological Assist Devices: Pacemakers, Defibrillators, Nerve and muscle
stimulators, Heart lung machine- ventilators-Basic ideas of CT scanner- MRI
scanner and ultrasonic scanner-Devices to protect against electrical hazards-
Microshock and macroshock, Centralized patient monitoring system.
